originContent: # Music Assistant Jukebox Integration (Deprecated)
translatedContent: # Integración Music Assistant Jukebox (Obsoleta)

originContent: ## Notice: this integration is not longer activly being maintained.
translatedContent: ## Aviso: esta integración ya no se mantiene activamente.

originContent: Music Assistant now has a Plugin that should be used instead and offers much of the same features.
translatedContent: Music Assistant ahora tiene un Plugin que debe usarse en su lugar y ofrece muchas de las mismas funciones.

originContent: See https://beta.music-assistant.io/plugins/party-mode/
translatedContent: Vea https://beta.music-assistant.io/plugins/party-mode/

originContent: A Home Assistant integration that provides a web-based song request system that integrates with Music Assistant to create an interactive jukebox experience for guests!
translatedContent: Una integración de Home Assistant que proporciona un sistema de solicitud de canciones basado en la web que se integra con Music Assistant para crear una experiencia de jukebox interactiva para los invitados.

originContent: ![Jukebox Interface](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/main/showcase.avifs)
translatedContent: ![Interfaz Jukebox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/main/showcase.avifs)

originContent: ## Features
translatedContent: ## Funciones

originContent: - Real-time song search across all connected Music Assistant providers
translatedContent: - Búsqueda de canciones en tiempo real en todos los proveedores de Music Assistant conectados

originContent: - Minimalist responsive design with album artwork display
translatedContent: - Diseño minimalista y responsive con visualización de la portada del álbum

originContent: - Check whats Now Playing and Up Next in real time.
translatedContent: - Consulta lo que se está reproduciendo y lo siguiente en tiempo real.

originContent: - No login required for guests, just share the URL
translatedContent: - No se requiere inicio de sesión para los invitados, solo comparte la URL

originContent: - Queue management through Home Assistant entities
translatedContent: - Gestión de la cola mediante entidades de Home Assistant

originContent: - Auto queues a default party playlist when the request queue is empty
translatedContent: - Cola automática de una lista de reproducción predeterminada para la fiesta cuando la cola de solicitudes está vacía

originContent: - Control queuing frequency (limit queue spamming)
translatedContent: - Control de la frecuencia de las colas (limita el spam en la cola)

originContent: - Access control through Home Assistant
translatedContent: - Control de acceso a través de Home Assistant

originContent: - Auto revoking/creating access tokens for security
translatedContent: - Revocación/creación automática de tokens de acceso por seguridad

originContent: Head on over to [Discussions / FeatureRequests](https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/discussions) if you want to request new features and general discussion!
translatedContent: Dirígete a [Discusiones / Solicitudes de Funciones](https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/discussions) si quieres solicitar nuevas funciones o para discusión general.

originContent: ## Prerequisites
translatedContent: ## Requisitos previos

originContent: Before installing this integration, make sure you have:
translatedContent: Antes de instalar esta integración, asegúrate de tener:

originContent: - Home Assistant instance with [Music Assistant](https://github.com/music-assistant/hass-music-assistant) integration
translatedContent: - Instancia de Home Assistant con la integración [Music Assistant](https://github.com/music-assistant/hass-music-assistant)

originContent: - Music Assistant Server Addon in Home Assistant (Seperately hosted HA/MA instances may not work)
translatedContent: - Complemento Music Assistant Server en Home Assistant (Instancias HA/MA alojadas por separado pueden no funcionar)

originContent: - A supported music provider configured in Music Assistant (e.g. Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)
translatedContent: - Un proveedor de música compatible configurado en Music Assistant (por ejemplo, Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

originContent: - Media player entity configured in Home Assistant
translatedContent: - Entidad de reproductor multimedia configurada en Home Assistant

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## Instalación

originContent: ### HACS (Recommended)
translatedContent: ### HACS (Recomendado)

originContent: [![Open your Home Assistant instance and open a repository inside the Home Assistant Community Store.](https://my.home-assistant.io/badges/hacs_repository.svg)](https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/hacs_repository/?owner=DJS91&repository=HAMusicAssistantJukebox&category=Integration)
translatedContent: [![Abre tu instancia de Home Assistant y abre un repositorio dentro de la Tienda Comunitaria de Home Assistant.](https://my.home-assistant.io/badges/hacs_repository.svg)](https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/hacs_repository/?owner=DJS91&repository=HAMusicAssistantJukebox&category=Integration)

originContent: or
translatedContent: o

originContent: 1. Add this repository to HACS as a custom repository
translatedContent: 1. Añade este repositorio a HACS como un repositorio personalizado

originContent: - HACS > Menu > Custom repositories
translatedContent: - HACS > Menú > Repositorios personalizados

originContent: - URL: `https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox`
translatedContent: - URL: `https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox`

originContent: - Category: Integration
translatedContent: - Categoría: Integración

originContent: 2. Click Install
translatedContent: 2. Haz clic en Instalar

originContent: 3. Restart Home Assistant
translatedContent: 3. Reinicia Home Assistant

originContent: ### Manual Installation
translatedContent: ### Instalación Manual

originContent: 1. Download the latest release
translatedContent: 1. Descarga la última versión

originContent: 2. Copy the `custom_components/music_assistant_jukebox` folder to your Home Assistant `custom_components` folder
translatedContent: 2. Copia la carpeta `custom_components/music_assistant_jukebox` en la carpeta `custom_components` de tu Home Assistant

originContent: 3. Restart Home Assistant
translatedContent: 3. Reinicia Home Assistant

originContent: ## Configuration
translatedContent: ## Configuración

originContent: 1. Go to Settings > Devices & Services
translatedContent: 1. Ve a Configuración > Dispositivos y Servicios

originContent: 2. Click "Add Integration"
translatedContent: 2. Haz clic en "Agregar Integración"

originContent: 3. Search for "Music Assistant Jukebox"
translatedContent: 3. Busca "Music Assistant Jukebox"

originContent: 4. Select your Music Assistant instance and media player entity
translatedContent: 4. Selecciona tu instancia de Music Assistant y la entidad del reproductor multimedia

originContent: 5. Go to Settings > Automations & Scenes > + Create Automation
translatedContent: 5. Ve a Configuración > Automatizaciones y Escenas > + Crear Automatización

originContent: 6. Select "Music Assistant Jukebox Controller" from the list.
translatedContent: 6. Selecciona "Controlador Music Assistant Jukebox" de la lista.

originContent: 7. Enter the same media player entity from Step 4 and enter the name of your default playlist from music assistant and click Save.
translatedContent: 7. Introduce la misma entidad del reproductor multimedia del Paso 4 e ingresa el nombre de tu lista de reproducción predeterminada de Music Assistant y haz clic en Guardar.

originContent: ## Usage
translatedContent: ## Uso

originContent: Switch on the jukebox using "JukeBox: Allow access" switch.
translatedContent: Enciende el jukebox usando el interruptor "JukeBox: Permitir acceso".

originContent: Access the jukebox via the new "Music Assistant Jukebox" Sidebar Panel OR
translatedContent: Accede al jukebox a través del nuevo Panel Lateral "Music Assistant Jukebox" O

originContent: Scan the QR Code entity of choice OR
translatedContent: Escanea la entidad del Código QR que prefieras O

originContent: Access the jukebox interface directly at:
translatedContent: Accede directamente a la interfaz del jukebox en:

originContent: http://homeassistant:8123/local/jukebox/jukebox.html
translatedContent: http://homeassistant:8123/local/jukebox/jukebox.html

originContent: ## Entities
translatedContent: ## Entidades

originContent: The integration adds these entities to Home Assistant:
translatedContent: La integración añade estas entidades a Home Assistant:

originContent: ### Switches
translatedContent: ### Interruptores

originContent: - `switch.jukebox_queue`: Enable/disable queuing of songs (No manual control required. Managed by automation.)
translatedContent: - `switch.jukebox_queue`: Activar/desactivar la cola de canciones (No se requiere control manual. Gestionado por automatización.)

originContent: - `switch.jukebox_allow_access`: Enable/disable access to the jukebox interface
translatedContent: - `switch.jukebox_allow_access`: Activar/desactivar el acceso a la interfaz del jukebox

originContent: - `switch.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_play_music_on_start`: Turn on/off if the default playlist plays automatically when the jukbox is turned on.
translatedContent: - `switch.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_play_music_on_start`: Activar/desactivar si la lista de reproducción predeterminada se reproduce automáticamente al encender el jukebox.

originContent: ### Number
translatedContent: ### Número

originContent: - `number.jukebox_queue_length`: Shows current queue length (No manual adjustment required, Managed by automation)
translatedContent: - `number.jukebox_queue_length`: Muestra la longitud actual de la cola (No se requiere ajuste manual, gestionado por automatización)

originContent: - `number.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_queuing_delay`: Set a delay between song requests for guests (seconds) (0 = off)
translatedContent: - `number.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_queuing_delay`: Establece un retraso entre las solicitudes de canciones para invitados (segundos) (0 = desactivado)

originContent: ### Sensor
translatedContent: ### Sensor

originContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_external_qr_code`: External Jukebox UI Access QR code image for easy sharing on dashboards for users not on your network
translatedContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_external_qr_code`: Código QR de acceso a la interfaz externa del Jukebox para compartir fácilmente en paneles con usuarios que no estén en tu red

originContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_internal_qr_code`: Internal Jukebox UI Access QR code image for easy sharing for users on your network
translatedContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_internal_qr_code`: Código QR de acceso a la interfaz interna del Jukebox para compartir fácilmente con usuarios en tu red

originContent: ## Automation Blueprint
translatedContent: ## Plano de Automatización

originContent: The integration includes an automation blueprint that handles:
translatedContent: La integración incluye un plano de automatización que gestiona:

originContent: - Queue length tracking
translatedContent: - Seguimiento de la longitud de la cola

originContent: - Default playlist fallback
translatedContent: - Reproducción de lista predeterminada como respaldo

originContent: - Access control
translatedContent: - Control de acceso

originContent: - Media player control
translatedContent: - Control del reproductor multimedia

originContent: To use the blueprint:
translatedContent: Para usar el plano:

originContent: 1. Go to Settings > Automations & Scenes
translatedContent: 1. Ve a Configuración > Automatizaciones y Escenas

originContent: 2. Click "+ Create Automation"
translatedContent: 2. Haz clic en "+ Crear Automatización"

originContent: 3. Select "Music Assistant Jukebox Controller"
translatedContent: 3. Selecciona "Controlador de Jukebox de Music Assistant"

originContent: 4. Configure:
translatedContent: 4. Configura:

originContent: - Media Player: Select your Music Assistant media player
translatedContent: - Reproductor Multimedia: Selecciona tu reproductor multimedia de Music Assistant

originContent: - Default Playlist: Enter the name of your fallback playlist
translatedContent: - Lista Predeterminada: Ingresa el nombre de tu lista de reproducción de respaldo

originContent: ## Credits
translatedContent: ## Créditos

originContent: Big thanks to:
translatedContent: Un gran agradecimiento a:

originContent: - [OddPirate](https://github.com/TheOddPirate) for their contrubutions to making this into an integration.
translatedContent: - [OddPirate](https://github.com/TheOddPirate) por sus contribuciones para convertir esto en una integración.

originContent: - [PilaScat](https://github.com/PilaScat) for their contributions to clean up, polish and UI improvements.
translatedContent: - [PilaScat](https://github.com/PilaScat) por sus contribuciones en limpieza, pulido y mejoras de la interfaz.
